emails.subject: Re: 12/4 term
emails.body: Re: 12/4 term I've changed the term to 12/4, and I'm going to make a note in our daily deal correction report that this was due to a late report from EES. Thanks for catching this. Kate Stephanie Piwetz 12/19/2000 09:02 AM

emails.subject: 12/4 term
emails.body: Kate, below is the EES spreadsheet that has the shows the powerex trade shown on 12/4/00. Please verify and we can backdate the trade and reconfirm the document, or we can initial Powerex change and send back to them to show that we are in agreement. Thanks Stephanie Forwarded by Stephanie Piwetz/HOU/ECT on 12/19/2000 10:54 AM Jubran Whalan@EES 12/04/2000 04:42 PM

emails.subject: Re: 12/4 term
emails.body: I just wrote on our confirm that we are in agreement to trade date 12/4/00 per Matt Motley and faxed it back to Powerex for the records and kept fax transmittal, and sent it off for filing. Just letting you know. Thanks Kate Symes 12/19/2000 11:26 AM
